title: Elytra Trials
description: End city ships now have trial spawners and vaults.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99d69736f05d951b39b478a7082262aa3bb88805.webp)
### End city ships now have trial spawners and vaults.
After activating the trial spawner and killing a few Illusioners, a mob that doesn't usually spawn in Minecraft, players may be able to obtain an End Key with a bit of luck. This new item can be used to unlock End Vaults, which are replacing the elytra item frame and can contain powerful items, from totems of undying to elytra. The full loot table for end vaults can be viewed [here](https://misode.github.io/loot-table/?share=AZILyc0FDb). The elytra chance is around 10%.

---

<details>
<summary>Version 1.0 - Remove Elytra</summary>

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2705230eeaf54b4dbf0c8d394b72830a3f1e83a7.webp)

[Version 1.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/elytra-trials/version/1.0) is a very simple datapack and mod that **removes the elytra item frame** from end city ships by editing the `end_city/ship.nbt` structure file. You can download it on the [versions page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/elytra-trials/versions).
</details>
